div.p: ptrace(PTRACE_PEEKDATA, pid, addr, NULL) — -1 is both valid data AND error sentinel

g.text: errno | EIO or EFAULT (SET by kernel)

text.tspan: String read ABORTS early if tracee

g.text: clear errno BEFORE, check errno AFTER
any != -1 | 0 | SUCCESS — use return value as data
1 | Set errno=0 immediately before ptrace() call
2 | No other calls between clear and check (they may set errno)
3 | Check errno ONLY when return value is -1
4 | errno is thread-local — safe across threads

text.tspan: /* BUG: also fires when word IS -1 */
/* BUG: also fires when word IS -1 */

g.text: return value is identical in both cases
